foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Systematic preoperative assessment (ASA grading, airway evaluation, cardiac risk stratification) directly determines the perioperative management plan

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Perioperative fluid management requires understanding of maintenance requirements, deficit replacement, and third-space losses to prevent hypovolemia or fluid overload

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Intraoperative and postoperative transfusion decisions based on hemoglobin triggers and coagulation status are core perioperative skills

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Surgical site infection prevention through antibiotic prophylaxis timing, skin preparation, and aseptic technique is integral to perioperative care

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Recognition and management of intraoperative and postoperative shock (hemorrhagic, septic, anaphylactic) is a critical perioperative emergency
